g.title: AlgoTree
g.text: Agrinoze — Sensation Irrigation Algorithm · Stage Machine
Green = stages · Blue = decisions/triggers · Amber = yellow alerts · Red = red alerts · Purple = manual override
All threshold comparisons use daily sensor averages (mean of 144 readings · 1 per 10 min) — PRD 19.6.26

g.title: cluster_alerts
g.text: UNIVERSAL ALERTS — checked every cycle, in any stage

g.title: cluster_override
g.text: MANUAL OVERRIDE — available any time after start

g.title: opt
g.text: 2-week VWC daily avg + tensiometer daily avg checks

g.title: d_cal3adj
g.text: T20 daily avg at window end?

g.title: a_opt_high
g.text: VWC daily avg < optimal OR T20 daily avg > 40mb →

g.title: sa_cal2a
g.text: Cal2: T20 daily avg no rise > 40mb
